scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules package-lock.json
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @bim/test-toolkit && npm run build -w @bim/lib && npm run build -w @bim/domain && npm run build -w @bim/db
scripts.build:api: npm run build:libs && npm run build -w @bim/api && npm run build:front && npm run copy:front -w @bim/api
scripts.build:indexer: npm run build:libs && npm run build -w @bim/indexer
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:indexer
scripts.test: npm run test -w @bim/test-toolkit && npm run test -w @bim/lib && npm run test -w @bim/domain && npm run test -w @bim/indexer && npm run test -w @bim/api && npm run test -w @bim/front
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres && until docker compose exec postgres pg_isready -U bim_user -d bim; do sleep 1; done && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://bim_user:bim_password@localhost:5432/bim npm run db:push
